title: MongoDB Delivers Strong Fourth Quarter Results, Soundly Beating Expectations
text: MongoDB reported strong fourth quarter results that exceeded analyst expectations across key metrics. The company delivered robust revenue growth alongside expanding customer metrics, with over 33,000 total customers and 1,307 customers with $100K+ ARR. Atlas momentum continued to accelerate with 85% YoY revenue growth, confirming market demand for MongoDB's cloud database offering. Management demonstrated operational discipline with gross margins reaching 74% and the company achieving positive operating cash flow for the full year 2022, a first in company history. The impressive results validated MongoDB's strategic shift toward cloud-first positioning and recurring revenue models. Investors rewarded the strong quarter with positive reactions, reflecting confidence in MongoDB's ability to capitalize on database market transformation driven by cloud migration trends. The company's track record of beating revenue expectations combined with expanding profitability metrics positions MongoDB well for continued investor support.
